prompts: Cinematic anime realism, luxury cruise engine room at night with warm flickering warning lights and rain-streaked porthole reflections. Theo Sable, a feminine ship band performer in formal stage attire, holds a heavy metal panel steady with a composed expression. Beside her, Noel Vale, a masculine passenger in elegant evening wear, uses a repair tool to tighten a bolt. Cooperative maintenance, stable camera, no sparks, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous engine room shot, consistent camera angle and lighting. Theo Sable maintains a firm, steady grip on the metal panel. Noel Vale completes the final turn of the repair tool, successfully securing the component. The flickering red warning lights stabilize into a steady, warm amber glow. Cinematic anime realism, no sparks, no text, no watermark.
